pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre-hospitalization Expenses: Medical expenses incurred up to 30 days immediately before the insured person is hospitalized.

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Post Hospitalization Expenses: Medical expenses incurred up to 60 days immediately after the insured person is discharged from the hosp

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Star Health day-care procedures page; 540+ procedures)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Treatment: Medical expenses for Inpatient Hospitalization incurred on treatment under Ayurveda, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems of medicines in a AYUSH Hospital is payable up to the sum insured.

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: Cumulative bonus calculated at 10% of basic sum insured for each claim free year sub

restoration_benefit.source_quote: automatic restoration of the Basic Sum Insured once by 100% upon exhaustion of the limit of coverage during the policy period
